title: Soft Touch Newborn Essentials 100% Cotton Baby Ribbed Clothes for 0-3 Months 5 Pcs Set Long Sleeve Sleepsuit, Bodysuit, Newborn Hat, Mittens, and Bib for Boys and Girls
features: Complete 5-Piece Newborn Baby Clothes: Soft and super cute ribbed baby clothes for 0-3 months including bodysuit, sleepsuit, hat, baby mittens and bib. Perfect essentials for baby boys and girls with gentle fabric that's kind to delicate skin

Premium Quality that Lasts: Made from a super-soft ribbed cotton bodysuit and sleepsuit that stay comfortable wash after wash. These baby suits for 0-3 months are designed to keep your little one cosy throughout day and night, perfect for baby boys and baby girls as they withstand daily wear

Thoughtfully Designed For Babies: Easy-change poppers for quick nappy changes, fold-over mittens to prevent scratching, stretchy babygrow fabric that grows with your newborn. The baby sleepsuit and bodysuit for baby boys and girls come with practical comfort features

Perfect For Boys And Girls: Versatile unisex newborn clothes that work for both baby boys and girls. Mix and match this essential ribbed baby clothes set to create different outfits for any occasion. Available in six beautiful colours: Pink, Blue, Biscuit, Dusty Blue, Sage and White

Ideal Baby Shower Gift: Beautifully packaged baby clothes for 0-3 months that make the perfect present for new parents. A practical and thoughtful newborn baby gift set including essential bodysuit, sleepsuit, mittens, hat, and bib for any newborn boy or girl, creating the perfect baby coming home outfit collection
description: Product Description Product Features High Quality Metal Poppers Quality is key, and when it comes to your baby, we know you want the best. We use high quality YKK poppers on our garments to ensure a secure, long lasting fit. These poppers are easy to use for quick changing, whilst maintaining a secure fit when closed. Velcro Bib (Hook and Loop Fastener) Velcro bib for quick and simple application on your infant. We ensure the scratchy side faces away from your babies skin to reduce risk of irritation and scratching. Provides a secure fastening method to keep the bib attached during messy mealtimes! Beautifully Packaged Presented in a beautifully designed ziplock recyclable bag. Authentic Soft Touch product developed to provide new parents a quality, affordable newborn baby essential clothing bundle set. Cuffed Mitten built into Sleepsuit Our sleepsuit puts comfort first. Ensuring your baby doesn't experience irritation at night, we have included built-in cuffs which act as anti-scratch mittens preventing the baby from scratching and causing skin irritation during their sleep. 6 Stunning Colour Choices Available in the following Colours: BLUE, PINK, WHITE, SAGE GREEN, DUSTY BLUE, BISCUIT. Providing an elegant selection of tasteful colours that are perfect for complementing a range of styles, outfits and accessories. Soft Touch ZERO EST 1986, Soft Touch is a well established brand with the UK and Europe, renonwned for providing high quality, affordable babywear to independent retail stores. ZERO was launched in 2022 by Soft Touch to identify and differentiate our range of products focussed on providing a more sustainable future. This garment set was one of the first baby clothing articles in the UK to carry the OEKO-TEX Class 1 certificate, making the product certified for using AZO-free dyes which are safer for infants, and far better for the environment. Authentic Soft Touch Quality We demand the best quality for our customers. When you recieve a Soft Touch product, you can expect to recieve a high quality item that has been made using the best modern practices. We always strive to put the customer first, and our friendly, easily recognisable packaging allows our customers to know when they are recieving products from a trusted brand. It's all in the details We go the extra mile to make our products stand out from the rest of the market. With stunning wood-effect buttons, high quality fasteners and poppers, elasticated mittens and cuffed sleepsuits with built in scratch protection mittens, our products are designed with the babies comfort at style the forefront. Colour Range Soft Touch Zero - Sustainability Soft Touch Packaging Design Details We have replaced our inner neck labels with a print to make our products even comfier for infants Soft Touch ZERO range extends to a range of products Beautiful Design When closed, our colour matching poppers provide a seamless design, whilst maintaining the functionality and ease of use for quick changing, easy access and quick securing of the garment on your infant The Soft Touch Range ZERO CATALOGUE Soft Touch offer a wide range of products under the ZERO label, providing customers with more eco-consciuous products when buying for their infants. These include: Soft Toys and comforters Clothing and garment sets Baby wraps and blankets Baby bootees and mittens Baby hats and headwear
